name: Damage and Clone Cycle
summary: Tod beendet den Charakterbogen nicht: naechster Klon uebernimmt mit gleichem Profil.

mechanics.replacement: On death, advance clone number and re-enter when fiction allows.
mechanics.hard_end_condition: Death of clone #6 requires a new character.
mechanics.play_effect: Encourages bold decisions and lethal slapstick pacing.
